description_long: This is a shallow, round ceramic bowl with a wide opening and two small, rounded handles on opposite sides. The bowl has a light beige to tan coloration with subtle darker bands encircling the interior and exterior, giving it a rustic, handmade appearance. The surface appears matte with some slight textural irregularities, suggesting it is unglazed or only lightly glazed. The handles are integrated into the rim, providing a secure grip for lifting or carrying. The bowl's interior is smooth and gently sloped, suitable for holding food or liquids. There are no visible decorative motifs beyond the natural color variations and banding.
description: A shallow, round ceramic bowl with two small side handles and subtle banded coloration in beige and tan tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rounded handles and the full circular opening of the bowl.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting one handle and the bowl's shallow depth, with the opposite handle partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying both handles and the bowl's symmetrical shape.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the other handle and the bowl's gently sloped interior.
